issue: exported component handles sensitive intent actions

details.reason: Receiver 'com.lookout.acron.scheduler.internal.SystemBroadcastReceiver' is reachable from other apps and handles sensitive system intent actions. Verify that all incoming Intent data is validated before use.

Provider 'com.lookout.sdkcoresecurity.internal.SdkCoreSecurityContentProvider' has an intent-filter but no explicit android:exported attribute. On API < 31 this defaults to exported=true. No permission guard found — potentially accessible by any app.

issue: deep-link activity with custom URI scheme and no permission

details.reason: Activity 'com.att.shm.activities.MainActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'smarthomemanager://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
